title: BABY born Emma, ​​Baby Doll with 10 Functions and Accessories, For Children Aged 3 and Over, Works without Batteries, 43cm Tall Doll, 836392 Zapf Creation
features: Bring Emma home to play! With 10 lifelike functions and 10 fun accessories, Emma can drink, sleep, cry, bathe and wet her nappy
Accessories include a magical feeding bowl with a fun water-reveal feature
Potty also has a water-reveal feature for fun potty training
Closes and opens eyes by turning the dummy
No batteries required, Suitable for children aged 3+
43cm doll, to fit all BABY born 43cm clothing
description: From the manufacturer Emma has 10 lifelike features including drinking water, wetting her nappy, going on the potty, crying real tears, closing her eyes when you lay her down and she can go into the bath! Included in the doll starter pack are a magical feeding bowl and potty that both have a fun water-reveal feature. Pop in the magic dummy and twist it to see Emma magically open and close her eyes. BABY born Emma 43cm Emma is available in her adorable new outfit and comes with 10 accessories for opening up a world of realistic, nurturing play. Each accessory is made with fun attention to detail, including the new Magic Plate – just use water to reveal a delicious meal for your BABY born or pop her on the potty after enjoying her meal and press her tummy to see her go to the toilet just like a big girl, the water will even reveal a poop in her potty! BABY born Eva BABY born Jonas Add To Basket Add To Basket Customer Reviews 4.6 out of 5 stars 104 4.6 out of 5 stars 218 Price £44.99 £ 44 . 99 £44.99 £ 44 . 99 Size For 43cm dolls For 43cm dolls Age Recommendation 3+ years 3+ years Set Includes BABY born Eva with magical feeding bowl with a fun water-reveal feature. BABY born Jonas with magical feeding bowl with a fun water-reveal feature.
